response.global_analysis: The video features promotional dialogue between the five members of HoloX regarding their 4th anniversary events. No vocal music (singing) is present, which aligns with the provided Reference JSON. The dialogue is extremely fast-paced and involves frequent overlapping speech. Subtitles are tightly wrapped to the vocal bursts and segmented logically to maintain readability during rapid exchanges. On-screen text for collaboration details (dates, locations, convenience stores) was cross-referenced to ensure accuracy in transcription and translation.

subtitles.original: なるようになるよ。
subtitles.english: It'll be what it'll be.

subtitles.original: でもこれで知ってくれた人もいるよね、多分。
subtitles.english: But I'm sure some people found out about us through this.

subtitles.original: ねえ！絶対そう！
subtitles.english: Yeah! Definitely!

subtitles.original: もう一枚あります！どうぞ！
subtitles.english: We have one more! Here it is!

subtitles.original: おおー！えっ、待って待って！
subtitles.english: Oh! Wait, wait!

subtitles.original: 新宿！
subtitles.english: Shinjuku!

subtitles.original: アルペン東京だ！
subtitles.english: It's Alpen Tokyo!

subtitles.original: あれ、後ろにも映ってる！え、聞いてた？
subtitles.english: Wait, we're on the screen behind them too! Did you hear about this?

subtitles.original: 聞いてた？あれ聞いてた？うそ、聞いてない！
subtitles.english: Did you hear? Did you hear? No way, I didn't!

subtitles.original: 待って、今日のあの21時前に流れていたあのよくわからない映像。
subtitles.english: Wait, that mysterious video that was playing before 9 PM today...

subtitles.original: あのよくわからない映像…
subtitles.english: That mysterious video...

subtitles.original: おい！流れてしまったのかよ！大丈夫か？
subtitles.english: Hey! It actually played?! Is it okay?

subtitles.original: あれ流れてんのかよ！
subtitles.english: That's what was playing?!

subtitles.original: でももっとさ、なんかかっこいいMVとかさ、
subtitles.english: But you know, I wanted something cooler, like an MV...

subtitles.original: ライブ映像とか流したらもっと…
subtitles.english: If they played live footage, it would be even...

subtitles.original: なあ！？なんだよあれ！
subtitles.english: Right?! What was that?!

subtitles.original: でもありがとう！
subtitles.english: But thank you!

subtitles.original: ありがとー！やったー！
subtitles.english: Thank you! Yay!

subtitles.original: ということでこちら、応募どれぐらい来たと思う？
subtitles.english: So, how many applications do you think we got for this?

subtitles.original: でもさ、お仕事だからね。お仕事だから。
subtitles.english: But you know, it's a job. It's work.

subtitles.original: 500人とか来てくれてる？
subtitles.english: Maybe 500 people?

subtitles.original: 300人ぐらいじゃない？
subtitles.english: Around 300?

subtitles.original: 大変だからね。
subtitles.english: Because it's hard work.

subtitles.original: なんと！
subtitles.english: Well, actually!

subtitles.original: 数千人の応募が来たということでございます！
subtitles.english: We received several thousand applications!

subtitles.original: すごすぎる！ありがとう！
subtitles.english: That's incredible! Thank you!

subtitles.original: 驚きすぎだろ！
subtitles.english: You guys are overreacting!

subtitles.original: えー！そんなに！？
subtitles.english: What?! That many?!

subtitles.original: 全部給料もらったせいで。給料もらってるって決まってるから。
subtitles.english: It's all because they're being paid. It's definitely because of the salary.

subtitles.original: あの、いろはよりも多めに渡してます。
subtitles.english: Um, I'm giving them more than Iroha's share.

subtitles.original: やめてよ！しっかり福利厚生ホワイトな…
subtitles.english: Stop it! We have solid welfare benefits, we're a "white" society...

subtitles.original: アジトミーさんですから。
subtitles.english: Because it's Ajitomy.

subtitles.original: ありがとー。ありがとうございます。
subtitles.english: Thank you. Thank you very much.

subtitles.original: 応募してくれたみんなもありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thanks to everyone who applied too!

subtitles.original: そして次はなんだ？
subtitles.english: And what's next?

subtitles.original: お、オープン！来い来い来い！
subtitles.english: Oh, open! Come on, come on!

subtitles.original: なにこれ？あ、来た！じゃじゃーん！
subtitles.english: What's this? Oh, here it is! Ta-da!

subtitles.original: タワーコラボだー！
subtitles.english: It's a tower collaboration!

subtitles.original: 俺たちがタワーになるぞ！タワー！
subtitles.english: We're going to become towers! Towers!

subtitles.original: ということで、皆さんタワーコラボもう情報公開されていますが、こちら！
subtitles.english: So, the information for the tower collab is already out, but here it is!

subtitles.original: 全国4ヶ所で行われる「holoX Tower Invasion」！
subtitles.english: "HoloX Tower Invasion," held at 4 locations nationwide!

subtitles.original: イェーイ！12月4日から開催されます！
subtitles.english: Yay! It starts on December 4th!

subtitles.original: さっぽろテレビ塔、東京タワー、中部電力 MIRAI TOWER、梅田スカイビルで開催されますので、
subtitles.english: It will be held at Sapporo TV Tower, Tokyo Tower, Nagoya Mirai Tower, and Umeda Sky Building...

subtitles.original: ぜひ、皆さん行ってくださいね！
subtitles.english: So please, everyone, go check it out!

subtitles.original: 行ってねー！俺たちがホロックス重体タワー！
subtitles.english: Go check it out! We are the HoloX Stacked Tower!

subtitles.original: おい待て、待て！
subtitles.english: Hey wait, wait!

subtitles.original: 今回大事なことがあるんですけど、ちゃんと予約をしないとですね、
subtitles.english: There's something important this time. If you don't make a reservation...

subtitles.original: あの、皆さん入れないんで。事前予約必須です。
subtitles.english: Well, you won't be able to get in. Advance reservation is mandatory.

subtitles.original: そうなんです、事前予約ね。忘れてる人も多分いると思うので。
subtitles.english: That's right, advance reservation. I think some people might forget.

subtitles.original: その場で行っても入れないらしい！
subtitles.english: Apparently you can't get in if you just show up!

subtitles.original: 皆さん、予約を忘れないように！
subtitles.english: Everyone, don't forget to reserve!

subtitles.original: ぜひぜひお願いしますよ。
subtitles.english: Please, please do it.

subtitles.original: しとかないと。
subtitles.english: Gotta do it.

subtitles.original: おっと。次、次！
subtitles.english: Oops. Next, next!

subtitles.original: 次！オープン！はい！
subtitles.english: Next! Open! Yes!

subtitles.original: えー、なんと！ホロライブの新サービス。
subtitles.english: Um, what?! A new service from Hololive.

subtitles.original: ライブの感動を最速でその手に！
subtitles.english: Get the excitement of the live concert in your hands as quickly as possible!

subtitles.original: おおー、すごい！どういうことだ？
subtitles.english: Oh, cool! What does that mean?

subtitles.original: 秘密結社holoX、4周年のライブブロマイドが、
subtitles.english: The 4th Anniversary Live Bromides for Secret Society holoX...

subtitles.original: なんと今日のライブの写真が明日から、
subtitles.english: Photos from today's live will be available starting tomorrow...

subtitles.original: コンビニでプリントアウトできるんだ！
subtitles.english: To be printed out at convenience stores!

subtitles.original: どこでも手に入るんだ！
subtitles.english: You can get them anywhere!

subtitles.original: 対象店舗はファミリーマート、ローソン、ミニストップになります！
subtitles.english: Participating stores are FamilyMart, Lawson, and Ministop!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！いっぱいある！
subtitles.english: Thank you! There are so many!

subtitles.original: そして今からネットで事前購入ができるらしいです。
subtitles.english: And apparently you can pre-purchase them online starting now.

subtitles.original: マジ？！そうなんだ。
subtitles.english: Really?! I see.

subtitles.original: ただね、明日からコンビニでも写真を選びながら購入することもできるみたいなので、
subtitles.english: But you can also buy them while choosing photos at convenience stores from tomorrow,

subtitles.original: 詳しくは左下のリンクから確認してみてください！
subtitles.english: So please check the link in the bottom left for details!

subtitles.original: こっちこっち！このへん。
subtitles.english: Over here, over here! Around here.

subtitles.original: さらにですね、今回はそちらのお写真に、ブロマイドに、
subtitles.english: Furthermore, this time, on those photos, on the bromides...

subtitles.original: 私たちのメッセージをつけることができるみたいなんですけれども。
subtitles.english: It seems we can add our messages to them.

subtitles.original: えっ、すごい！
subtitles.english: Oh, wow!

subtitles.original: あ、今から書く？
subtitles.english: Ah, are we writing them now?

subtitles.original: ちょっと、急すぎないか！？
subtitles.english: Wait, isn't this too sudden?!

subtitles.original: 浮いてる、浮いてる！
subtitles.english: They're floating! They're floating!

subtitles.original: しかも何も考えてないけど、まあまあ考えて書いてください。
subtitles.english: And I haven't thought of anything, but well, please think and write.

subtitles.original: 何にどうなんのこれ？考えて書いてください。
subtitles.english: What is this going to be? Please think and write.

subtitles.original: はい、えーっと。
subtitles.english: Yes, uh...

subtitles.original: 時間もね、迫ってますから早く書いてください。
subtitles.english: Time is running out, so please write quickly.

subtitles.original: にゃにゃにゃ… さて。意外と集中力いるね。
subtitles.english: Nya nya nya... Well then. This takes quite a bit of focus.

subtitles.original: つなげ、つなげ。乾杯、乾杯で。できたー！
subtitles.english: Keep it going, keep it going. Cheers, cheers. Done!

subtitles.original: 早いね！見せて！ちょっと待って。
subtitles.english: That was fast! Show us! Wait a sec.

subtitles.original: これ、あ、可愛い。まあまあこよりっぽいですね。
subtitles.english: This, oh, cute. It's very Koyori-ish.

subtitles.original: あーいいですね。こよりっぽい。いつまで書いてんねん。
subtitles.english: Ah, it's good. Very Koyori. How long are you going to keep writing?

subtitles.original: 揚げにこだわった？回収回収。これ。
subtitles.english: Obsessed with the deep-fry? Collect, collect. This.

subtitles.original: サバンナ出して。皆さんお願いしますね。
subtitles.english: Show the savannah. Everyone, please check it out.

subtitles.original: ということでこれでお願いします。
subtitles.english: So, please look forward to these.

subtitles.original: まあ皆ね、何書いたかすごく気になると思うのですが。
subtitles.english: I'm sure everyone is very curious about what we wrote.

subtitles.original: こちらのメッセージの内容は、皆が… えっと、私が書いた…
subtitles.english: The contents of these messages are what everyone... um, what I wrote...

subtitles.original: おい！言っちゃダメですよ！
subtitles.english: Hey! You can't say that!

subtitles.original: 言わないで！みんな買ってからの…
subtitles.english: Don't say it! It's a surprise for after they buy it...

subtitles.original: ダメに決まってんだろ。
subtitles.english: Of course you can't say it.

subtitles.original: ごめんなさい。はい、そして。
subtitles.english: Sorry. Yes, and...

subtitles.original: まだ2枚もあるんで。お次は、こちら！
subtitles.english: There are still two more. Next is this!

subtitles.original: な、なんと！「あの作品とコラボ！？」
subtitles.english: W-what?! "Collaboration with THAT work!?"

subtitles.original: え？！なに？なに？
subtitles.english: Eh?! What? What?

subtitles.original: あの作品？どれだ？これマジ知らない。
subtitles.english: That work? Which one? I seriously don't know this.

subtitles.original: あの作品って何ですか？こちらをどうぞ！
subtitles.english: What is "that work"? Here it is!

subtitles.original: サテー
subtitles.english: Anyway...

subtitles.original: 突然デハアルガ、
subtitles.english: It's sudden, but...

subtitles.original: 或ル秘密結社ノ
subtitles.english: of a certain secret society...

subtitles.original: 話ヲシヨウ。
subtitles.english: let's talk.

subtitles.original: 人間ハ、
subtitles.english: Humans are...
